Class Post

java.lang.Object
entityClasses.Post
public class Post extends Object
Represents one discussion board post. This class supports assignment stories where users create, read, update, and soft-delete posts.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final int
    MAX_BODY_LENGTH
    Max allowed length for post bodies.
    static final int
    MAX_TITLE_LENGTH
    Max allowed length for post titles.

  • Constructor Details

    • Post

      public Post(int id, String title, String body, String author, String category)
      Creates a new Post with the current timestamp.
      Parameters:
      id - the id of the post
      title - the post title
      body - the post content
      author - the user who created the post
      category - the category of the post

    • Post

      public Post(int id, String title, String body, String author, String category, LocalDateTime timestamp)
      Constructor used when loading a post from the database.
      Parameters:
      id - post id
      title - post title
      body - post body
      author - post author
      category - post category
      timestamp - time the post was created

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(String newTitle, String newBody)
      Updates the title and body of the post.
      Parameters:
      newTitle - updated title
      newBody - updated body

      Checks whether the post has been marked deleted.
      Returns:

    • setBody

      public void setBody(String body)
      Sets the body of the post. Used when loading data from the database.
      Parameters:
      body - post body
